name: Mimic Dungeon
description: A crude sign stands at the edge of the dungeon, smeared with slime and warning symbols: “Do not open the chests.” Yet the promise of treasure is too tempting. The moment a latch is lifted, the truth is revealed—not gold, but teeth, tongue, and writhing tentacles. The mimic drags its victim screaming into a prison of flesh and slime, where time has no meaning. For days, it restrains and breeds them in endless cycles, until the chest begins to leak thick seed from its keyhole. Only when full does it spit its prey back into the dungeon—naked, dazed, dripping, and sometimes carrying its spawn. The mimic does not choose who it takes; man, woman, beast, or adventurer, all are just treasures to be claimed, bred, and marked forever.
creator: The Big Bad Wolf
